examples.name: jsonl-to-cpd
examples.description: Convert flat JSONL with enum-like fields to CPD YAML. The 'status' column is auto-promoted to a join table.

examples.name: jsonl-to-cpd-force-join
examples.description: Same input, but explicitly force 'status' as a join table with -join-tables.

examples.name: cpd-to-jsonl
examples.description: Expand a compacted CPD YAML (positional arrays + join tables) back to full JSONL.

examples.name: sparse-jsonl-expand
examples.description: Expand sparse JSONL where _meta/_version carry-forward context across records.

examples.name: payload-absorption
examples.description: Fields that don't match any join table are collected into the 'payload' catch-all column. Override the column name with -payload-column.
